natspec.details: Implements a Commit-Reveal cryptographic voting scheme for voter anonymity. Highly optimized for gas efficiency utilizing custom errors and tightly packed structs.

changeState(uint8).details: Admin function to transition between COMMIT, REVEAL, and CLOSED phases

commitVote(bytes32).details: Step 1: Submit a hashed commitment `keccak256(abi.encodePacked(candidateIndex, secret))`

revealVote(uint256,bytes32).details: Step 2: Reveal the candidate index and secret to tally the vote
